items.title: Australian pleads guilty to creating deepfake porn in landmark case
items.dek: The 19-year-old is the first person to be charged under a new national law.
items.body: The 19-year-old is the first person to be charged under a new national law.

items.title: Kanye West postpones France gig until further notice
items.dek: It comes a week after the UK announced it would block the rapper from entering the country, where he was due to headline a music festival in summer.
items.body: It comes a week after the UK announced it would block the rapper from entering the country, where he was due to headline a music festival in summer.

items.title: South Korea jails American YouTuber for public nuisance
items.dek: Johnny Somali sparked outrage after kissing a statue representing World War Two sex slaves.
items.body: Johnny Somali sparked outrage after kissing a statue representing World War Two sex slaves.
